title: Resolve Dependabot High-Severity Alerts (6 critical CVEs)
description: Update package dependencies to fix 6 high-severity CVEs and 13 moderate alerts. Ensure production is not vulnerable to publicly disclosed exploits.
blockers: Cannot deploy to production with known CVEs
acceptance_criteria: All 6 high-severity CVEs updated to patched versions
All 13 moderate-severity alerts reviewed (update or document as low-risk)
Dependabot alerts clear or downgrade to informational
No breaking changes introduced (verify against test suite)
next_tasks: Merge P0-000, P0-002, P0-003, P0-004 in sequence
notes: After this, production is free of publicly disclosed vulnerabilities. Create a feature branch, update package.json, run full test suite, open PR to main, do not merge yourself. This completes the P0 security sprint.
